sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113131" key="xalko/kratos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκό-κρᾱτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113131.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with copper,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:10:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.10.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
